reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the deterministic prepare-input contract; do not treat prepare-input as reviewer launch, LLM review, eval planning, or review-result merge proof.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic packet-boundary behavior: prepare-input either emits the bounded review input and preserves no-LLM/no-merge semantics, or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by checked-in CLI and runtime tests: prepare-input emits `cautilus.claim_review_input.v1`, records bounded clusters and skipped claims, preserves current labels, leaves the source claim packet unchanged, and does not call an LLM or merge review results.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep these tests aligned when changing prepare-input packet shape, skipped-claim policy, stale-packet behavior, reviewer launch boundaries, or review-result merge behavior.
